items.title: Add a canonical AGENTS.md
items.rationale: No AGENTS.md at repo root — agents have to infer the canonical commands.
items.fix_hint: Add an AGENTS.md describing canonical install/test/lint commands and any do-not-touch paths.
items.suggested_patch:
--- a/AGENTS.md
+++ b/AGENTS.md
@@ -0,0 +1,18 @@
+# Agent guide
+
+Conventions for AI coding agents working in this repository.
+
+## Canonical commands
+
+- Install dev deps: `<replace with your install command>`
+- Run tests:        `<replace with your test command>`
+- Lint:             `<replace with your lint command>`
+
+## Do-not-touch
+
+- Generated/vendored directories (list them).
+- Lockfiles unless the change is intentional.
+
+## Headless contract
+
+The canonical commands above must run non-interactively.

items.title: Setup mentions a GUI step: 'log in to the dashboard'
items.rationale: Setup mentions a GUI step: 'log in to the dashboard'.
items.fix_hint:
Replace "open the dashboard to copy your API key" with "set
$YOURAPP_API_KEY (get one at https://example.com/settings/api)".
Move any GUI step into a one-time human bootstrap section clearly
separated from the headless install / run flow.

items.title: Gitignore: Covers Junk
items.rationale: .gitignore covers 6/12 groups; missing: go_vendor, rust_target, jvm_class, ide_junk, terraform, logs.
items.fix_hint:
Run `gitignore.io` for your stack and paste the result into
`.gitignore`. At minimum, cover: `__pycache__`, `node_modules`,
`.env`, `dist/`, `build/`, `*.log`, IDE settings, coverage dirs.

items.title: Hotspot: src/agent_readiness/cli
items.rationale: Hotspot: src/agent_readiness/cli.py changed 10 times and is >200 lines.
items.fix_hint:
For each hotspot, identify the dominant axes of change (e.g. one
file holds both API routing and validation logic) and split along
those lines. After the split, both halves see lower per-file churn.

items.title: None of these expected paths exist:
items.rationale: None of these expected paths exist: .coveragerc, codecov.yml, .codecov.yml, coveralls.yml, .coveralls.yml
items.fix_hint:
Add a coverage config (`.coveragerc` for pytest-cov, `codecov.yml` for
Codecov) so coverage signal is visible to both humans and agents.

items.title: None of these expected paths exist: CONTRIBUTING
items.rationale: None of these expected paths exist: CONTRIBUTING.md, CONTRIBUTING, .github/CONTRIBUTING.md
items.fix_hint:
Add a CONTRIBUTING.md describing branch naming, commit style,
required local checks, and the PR review flow.
